source.notes: Checked-in sample workflow aligned to curated login artifacts.

observedPreconditions: User starts from the Home page
Valid customer credentials exist for successful authentication scenarios
observedSteps: Click the person/profile button to open the Login page
Enter credentials and submit the login form
observedExpectedResult: The application opens the Login page and supports successful or failed authentication outcomes based on the entered credentials.
observedValidations: Login button is visible and clickable
Successful login transitions the application to an authenticated state
Invalid credentials keep the user on the login page with visible feedback
